title: DOMESTIC VIOLENCE & SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE DOMESTIC VIOLENCE & SEXUAL ASSAULT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency shelter, sexual assault response and hospital advocacy, and legal advocacy and assistance with restraining and stalking order paperwork. Volunteer opportunities available. 2208 SW 3rd Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Shelter: Age 18 and older, emancipated minors, and minors accompanied by an adult fleeing a violent situation, who are in immediate danger All other service: Varies by service Hours: Phone: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Live Chat: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Email (541) 758-0219 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 758-0219 Administration Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Digital Translation, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corvallis Transit Route bus line 6 stops directly in front, off 3rd Street Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Domestic Violence Shelters Protective/Restraining Orders Volunteer Opportunities Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - EDUCATING TO END VIOLENCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS AND SUPPORT LINE MUTUAL SUPPORT - SUPPORT GROUPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER AGAINST RAPE AND DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
